raw.event_series_title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Pirates Party 2026 Vol.1

raw.excerpt:
Draft Arena - OP Store Tournament Juin 2026

Venez tester votre deck dans un format de jeu hebdomadaire casual chill

Off-Meta Weekly

Restricted Leaders will be published in the WhatsApp community: https://chat.whatsapp.com/GjYec6d751mHvetzvQNbrz

---

Limited spaces only - max 36 Players

Registration is only valid when you purchase a ticket via https://www.twomoons.ch/events/one-piece-events/.
First come, first serve.
- On tournament day, come to the desk as usual and have your online purchase confirmed.
- We will then change your status to "Participating in Tournament". Once you see this displayed in the app, you're in.

Tournament system: Swiss, max 5 rounds

Prize pool: 3 Booster per person (min. 1 is guaranteed)
The Weekly One Piece TCG Events from RyuLand.

events.title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Pirates Party 2026 Vol.1

raw.event_series_title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Pirates Party 2026 Vol.1

raw.excerpt:
Ready for epic battles on the high seas? Join the One Piece Store Tournament, face off against other pirates of the Grand Line, and fight for glory and honor — set sail!

Format: Standard Constructed
Swiss Rounds – the number of rounds depends on the number of players
Match Structure: Best-of-One

The first Store Tournament of each month is played in an off-meta format. The list of banned leaders will be posted in the WhatsApp community: https://chat.whatsapp.com/Gw5DcC2OS1L0UkgVVfCa4o

Tournament starts at 18:30 - on-site check-in must be completed by 18:20!

-- Prize Pool --
• 3 booster packs per participant will be added to the prize pool
• All players receive 1 Booster Pack & 1 Tournament Participation Pack
• The Winner receives 1 Tournament Winner Pack
• The remaining Booster Packs will be awarded to the top placements in descending order

events.title: [Europe] ONE PIECE CARD GAME OP-16 Release Event

raw.excerpt:
DAS EVENT FINDET AN UNSERER NEUEN STORE LOCATION STATT:
Cardmaniac Store, Mitteldorfstrasse 35, 5033 Buchs

You will receive 6 booster packs of the respective set in English to build your 40-card deck for the event. For participation, we will also provide a special 6-color Leader card — all participants must use the provided Leader card. The required 10 DON!! cards, as well as any other necessary gameplay accessories, must be brought by each participant.

Format: Sealed
Swiss Rounds – the number of rounds depends on the number of players
Match Structure: Best-of-One

Tournament starts at 18:30 - on-site check-in must be completed by 18:20!

-- Prize Pool --
• All players receive 1 Release Pack & 1 Participation Pack
• The Winner receives 1 Tournament Winner Pack

events.title: [Europe] ONE PIECE CARD GAME OP-16 Release Event

raw.excerpt:
*OP16 Pre-Release*

Everyone builds a deck with 1 Rainbow Luffy Leader and 40 cards on site from:
- 6 boosters
- Participant pack & promo card

Deckbuilding Start: 11:00
Tournament Start: 12:00

---

Ticket release:
- Online tickets go on sale on Wednesday, 27.05.2026 at 18:00 at https://www.twomoons.ch/events/one-piece-events/
- This Bandai event will already appear earlier (from Fri 22.05.2026, 16:00), but registration on Bandai is NOT possible — your spot is only secured by the online ticket starting 27.05.2026, 18:00.

How to register — please read carefully:
- Registration is ONLY possible by purchasing an online ticket at https://www.twomoons.ch/events/one-piece-events/
- Self-registration via the Bandai TCG+ app is disabled for this event — you will NOT see a "Register" button here.
- First come, first serve. Without an online ticket your spot is not secured.

Check-in on event day:
- Come to the desk and tell us the name your ticket was purchased under — we will find you in our system. Your email is helpful in case of complications.
- We will then scan you into the Bandai TCG+ app on site.

Limited spaces only - max 48 Players

Tournament system: Swiss, max 5 rounds
Prize pool: 3 Booster per person (min. 1 is guaranteed)

For spontaneous updates, visit our WhatsApp community: https://chat.whatsapp.com/GjYec6d751mHvetzvQNbrz

raw.event_series_title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Pirates Party 2026 Vol.1

raw.excerpt:
Ready for epic battles on the high seas? Join the One Piece Store Tournament, face off against other pirates of the Grand Line, and fight for glory and honor — set sail!

Format: Standard Constructed
Swiss Rounds – the number of rounds depends on the number of players
Match Structure: Best-of-One

The first Store Tournament of each month is played in an off-meta format. The list of banned leaders will be posted in the WhatsApp community: https://chat.whatsapp.com/Gw5DcC2OS1L0UkgVVfCa4o

Tournament starts at 18:30 - on-site check-in must be completed by 18:20!

-- Prize Pool --
• 3 booster packs per participant will be added to the prize pool
• All players receive 1 Booster Pack & 1 Tournament Participation Pack
• The Winner receives 1 Tournament Winner Pack
• The remaining Booster Packs will be awarded to the top placements in descending order
